$comment: Spatial Extension Patch for unified-video-project-v3. Target: 3.1.0. All additions are optional — backward-compatible with v3.0.0. Merge instructions: (1) Add all entries from this $defs into the main schema's $defs. (2) Add the optional properties listed in _integrationPoints to the corresponding existing types. (3) Widen ConsistencyAnchor.anchorType enum to include 'spatial'. (4) Bump schemaVersion to 3.1.0.

CoordinateSystem.description: Declared spatial convention. Rule 7: metre unit. Two coordinate systems are compatible iff all three required fields match.

handedness.description: Right-handed = OpenGL, USD, Blender default. Left-handed = DirectX, Unity default.

unitM.description: Rule 7: scale factor to SI metres. 1.0 = coordinates are in metres. 0.01 = centimetres. 0.0254 = inches.

forwardAxis.description: Camera/character forward direction convention. Defaults to -Z for right-handed +Y-up systems (OpenGL).

Position3D.description: Point in 3D space. Units determined by enclosing CoordinateSystem.unitM. Rule 7: unitless numbers — unit inherited from coordinate system declaration.

Quaternion.description: Unit quaternion (Hamilton convention, scalar-last [x,y,z,w], matching glTF 2.0 §5.17.4 and USD GfQuatf). Constraint: x²+y²+z²+w² = 1 within floating-point tolerance. x-computed: normalization check.

EulerAnglesDeg.description: Euler angles in degrees. Rule 7: degrees. Convenience representation — quaternion is authoritative when both present.

order.description: Intrinsic rotation order. YXZ = Tait-Bryan (yaw→pitch→roll), common in film.

Orientation3D.description: Rotation in 3D. Primary: unit quaternion. Euler: optional convenience. lookAtTarget overrides both when present.

lookAtTarget.description: If set, orientation is derived: entity faces this world-space point. Overrides quaternion and eulerDeg.

lookAtUpHint.description: Up vector for lookAt resolution. Defaults to coordinate system up axis if absent.

Scale3D.description: Non-uniform scale factors. 1.0 = no scale. Negative = mirror on that axis.

Transform3D.description: Full 3D transform: translate, rotate, scale. Applied in TRS order (scale → rotate → translate) per glTF/USD convention.

matrix4x4.description: Column-major 4×4 homogeneous transform matrix. If present, overrides position/orientation/scale. 16 elements: [m00,m10,m20,m30, m01,m11,m21,m31, m02,m12,m22,m32, m03,m13,m23,m33].

BoundingVolume.description: Axis-aligned bounding box or bounding sphere. Rule 8: discriminated by volumeType.

volumeType.description: aabb = axis-aligned bounding box. sphere = bounding sphere.

aabbMin.description: Minimum corner of AABB. Required when volumeType=aabb.

aabbMax.description: Maximum corner of AABB. Required when volumeType=aabb.

sphereCenter.description: Center of bounding sphere. Required when volumeType=sphere.

sphereRadiusM.description: Rule 7: radius in scene-space units (scaled by CoordinateSystem.unitM → metres).

CameraKeyframe.description: Single keyframe in a camera motion path.

focalLengthMm.description: Rule 7: mm. Per-keyframe focal length for zoom shots.

focusDistanceM.description: Rule 7: metres. Per-keyframe focus distance for rack-focus.

CameraExtrinsics.description: Camera position and orientation in scene world space. CinematicSpec = intrinsics (lens). CameraExtrinsics = extrinsics (pose). Together: full projection pipeline.

transform.description: Camera pose in scene space. Position = optical center. Orientation = viewing direction per CoordinateSystem.forwardAxis.

motionPath.description: Keyframed camera path for moving shots. Ordered by timeSec. Overrides static transform for the shot duration.

constraintTarget.description: Entity the camera tracks (e.g., character). Orientation auto-adjusts to keep target framed.

constraintOffsetM.description: Offset from constraintTarget in target-local space. Rule 7: scene-space units.

PlacementKeyframe.description: Single keyframe in an entity motion path within a scene.

SpatialPlacement.description: Places an entity (character, prop, light, audio source) at a specific 3D position/orientation in scene space. Composition: owned by SceneSpace.

entityRef.description: The character, prop, or entity being placed.

transform.description: Position and orientation in scene space.

bounds.description: Spatial extent. Used for spatial queries and occlusion checks.

motionPath.description: Keyframed motion for moving entities. Ordered by timeSec.

interactionZoneRadiusM.description: Rule 7: metres. Radius within which other entities are considered 'interacting'.

facingDirection.description: World-space point the entity faces. Convenience alternative to setting orientation.

SpatialAnchor.description: Named spatial reference point for continuity rules. E.g., action lines for 180° rule, staging marks, sightlines.

radiusM.description: Rule 7: metres. Influence radius for proximity checks.

linkedAnchorId.description: For line-type anchors: the other endpoint. The segment between this and linkedAnchorId defines the constraint axis.

persistAcrossShots.description: If true, position is invariant across all shots in the scene.

SpatialRule.description: Individual spatial constraint. Rule 8: discriminated by ruleType.

SpatialConsistency.description: Spatial consistency contract. Parallels TemporalConsistency and CharacterCoherence.

maxPositionDriftM.description: Rule 7: metres. Max displacement of static entity between shots in same scene.

enforce180DegreeRule.description: Validate camera stays on one side of action_line anchors.

enforceScreenDirection.description: Validate character screen-direction consistency across cuts.

SceneSpace.description: 3D spatial context for a scene. All spatial data (camera extrinsics, entity placements, constraints) is in this coordinate system.

spatialAnchors.description: Named reference points for spatial continuity.

gravityVector.description: Direction and magnitude of gravity. Default intent: {x:0, y:-9.81, z:0} for +Y-up.

floorPlaneY.description: Ground plane coordinate. Rule 7: scene-space units.

universeRef.description: Optional reference to SharedSpatialUniverse for cross-project spatial interop.

sceneOriginInUniverse.description: Transform from scene origin to universe origin. Required when universeRef is set.

SharedSpatialUniverse.description: Cross-project spatial contract. Defines a shared world-space for multiple projects. Referenced by SceneSpace.universeRef.

coordinateSystem.description: Canonical coordinate system. Referencing scenes must use a compatible system.

landmarks.description: Universe-level named locations. Scenes align relative to these.

_integrationPoints._comment: These describe which optional properties to add to existing types. They are instructions, not schema — remove this block after applying.

CinematicSpec._action: Add these optional properties to the existing CinematicSpec.properties

cameraExtrinsics.description: Camera position and orientation in scene world space. Completes the projection model: intrinsics (lens) + extrinsics (pose).

spatialBridgeAnchorRef.description: Spatial bridge pattern: references SpatialAnchor/SpatialPlacement from preceding shot for spatial coherence. Parallels temporalBridgeAnchorRef.

SceneEntity._action: Add these optional properties to SceneEntity's allOf[1].properties

sceneSpace.description: 3D spatial context. All shots in this scene share this spatial context.

spatialConsistency.description: Spatial consistency contract for this scene.

ShotEntity._action: Add this optional property to ShotEntity's allOf[1].properties

spatialOverrides.description: Shot-specific entity placements overriding scene-level SceneSpace.placements.

EnvironmentEntity._action: Add these optional properties to EnvironmentEntity's allOf[1].properties

defaultSceneSpace.description: Default spatial setup for scenes using this environment.

CharacterEntity._action: Add these optional properties to CharacterEntity's allOf[1].properties

defaultBounds.description: Default bounding volume for this character.

heightM.description: Rule 7: metres. Standing height. Used for eye-level camera calculations.

PropEntity._action: Add this optional property to PropEntity's allOf[1].properties

defaultBounds.description: Default bounding volume for this prop.

spatialConsistency.description: Default spatial consistency requirements for quality profile.
